title: Creator Pack
description:
This is an Content Creation Pack. This pack can be used easily. 
Make Maps for your Content and Record your Minecraft gameplay. with Axiom and Flashback
body:
This is an Content Creation Pack. This pack can be used easily. 
Make Maps for your Content and Record your Minecraft gameplay. with Axiom and Flashback.
For Questions, help, ... come on my Discord Server.

## Use Cases
- Making Minecraft Films
- Timelapse
- and more

## Mods
- Flashback (Record and Export Videos)
- Axiom (Makeing Maps)
- Chunky (Pre-generates chunks)
- Customizable Player Models (Create a custom avatar using the built-in editor.)
- Iris (Shader)
- NoEmotecraft (Emotes)
- Sodium (rendering engine and optimization)
- Zoomify (Zoom)
- EntityCulling (Better Performance)

## Shader
- Complementary Shaders Reimagined

## Versions
- 1.21
- 1.21.1
